name: Chocolate Fudge Eggs
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 5/8 ounces each) Choc Pudding Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, pudding mix, and milk in a bowl. Stir until well mixed.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it reaches boiling point.
3. Simmer for 2 minutes while stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in confectioners' sugar and vanilla until smooth.
5. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before shaping into egg-like forms.
6. Place the shaped forms on a wax paper-lined tray and refrigerate until firm.
7. Melt the dipping chocolate separately.
8. Dip the cooled eggs into the melted chocolate, allowing excess to drip off.
9. Return the dipped eggs to the wax paper.
10. Let the coating set completely before serving.
Makes 2 1/2 pounds of filling. Source: newsletter 3-86
